entity.summary: Base-native decentralized exchange entity consolidating version-labelled Alien Base V2 and V3 discovery surfaces around the current first-party application.
entity.notes: The first-party application remains reachable. HEI models Alien Base as one exchange entity across V2 and V3 discovery rows rather than creating version-specific entities. Current exchange discovery sources preserve both the Base DEX identity and app.alienbase.xyz domain.

evidence.title: Alien Base official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application remains reachable and preserves the live Alien Base exchange surface.

evidence.title: Alien Base V2 DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX discovery data preserves Alien Base V2 on Base; HEI consolidates the version-labelled row into one Alien Base entity.

evidence.title: Alien Base V3 exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Exchange discovery data preserves the Alien Base V3 identity and app.alienbase.xyz domain, supporting entity-first consolidation with the V2 representation.
